purpose: AMD/ROCm GFX target index for custom-kernel corpus navigation.

families.agent_notes: Use as the CDNA2 data-center baseline. Do not generalize RDNA or CUDA-origin measurements to gfx90a.

representative_context: RDNA2 workstation/consumer targets where ROCm support is available
families.agent_notes: Treat as a portability and memory/launch-overhead lab. Do not assume CDNA Matrix Core behavior.
Strong for fixed-shape inference and memory-bound fusion. Verify exact SKU and ROCm toolkit support.
Keep portable gfx942 records separate from later CDNA4 or suffix-specific contracts.

representative_context: CDNA4 data-center targets supported by the installed ROCm stack
families.agent_notes: Verify target support with hipcc and re-run vendor baselines after ROCm/library upgrades.

representative_context: RDNA4 workstation/consumer/deployment targets supported by the installed ROCm stack
families.agent_notes: Keep RDNA4 deployment records separate from CDNA4 data-center records.

evidence_rules: Record the exact reported gfx target from rocminfo.
Record hipcc target support from the installed ROCm toolkit.
Do not cite CUDA compute capability, SASS, cubin, or Nsight evidence as ROCm evidence.
Use timing-only for HIP-event or framework timings without rocprofiler/rocprof counters.
